Interface Item

All Known Implementing Classes:
Armor, Gold, ItemEmpty, ManaStone, Relic, Slot, Weapon
public sealed interface Item permits Armor, Weapon, Gold, Slot, ItemEmpty, Relic, ManaStone
Sealed interface defining the common behavior of all items in the game. Items can be Weapons, Armors, Gold, Relics, ManaStones, or even Empty Slots. Each item has properties like size (shape), rarity, cost, and rotation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Item
    becomeCursed()
    Applies a curse to the item.
    static Cost
    buyingPrice(Item item)
    Calculates the buying price of an item in a shop based on its rarity.
    Cost
    cost()
    Returns the resource cost to use or equip the item.
    static Item
    getRandom(ItemEnum ie, int level)
    Factory method to create a random item based on a category and level.
    static int
    getWeight(Rarity rarity)
    Returns the weighted probability for a given rarity to appear in loot generation.
    UUID
    id()
    Returns the unique identifier of the item instance.
    default boolean
    isCursed()
    Checks if the item currently has a curse.
    String
    name()
    Returns the name of the item.
    Rarity
    rarity()
    Returns the rarity of the item (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Relic).
    default Item
    removeCursed()
    Removes the curse from the item.
    Item
    rotate()
    Rotates the item 90 degrees clockwise.
    int
    rotation()
    Returns the current rotation state index (0, 1, 2, or 3).
    static Cost
    sellingPrice(Item item)
    Calculates the selling price of an item (how much the merchant pays you).
    List<Coordinate>
    size()
    Returns the list of coordinates (shape) the item occupies in the inventory grid.
    default Item
    unwrap()
    Unwraps the item if it's decorated or wrapped (e.g., CursedItem wrapper).

  • Method Details

    • size

      List<Coordinate> size()
      Returns the list of coordinates (shape) the item occupies in the inventory grid. This shape changes based on the item's rotation.
      Returns:
      a list of coordinates relative to the item's anchor (0,0).

    • rarity

      Rarity rarity()
      Returns the rarity of the item (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, Relic).
      Returns:
      the item's rarity.

    • cost

      Cost cost()
      Returns the resource cost to use or equip the item. This can be Energy, Mana, or Gold.
      Returns:
      the cost object.

    • rotate

      Item rotate()
      Rotates the item 90 degrees clockwise.
      Returns:
      the item itself (if mutable) or a new rotated instance (if immutable).

    • name

      String name()
      Returns the name of the item.
      Returns:
      the name as a String.

    • id

      UUID id()
      Returns the unique identifier of the item instance. Useful for distinguishing identical items.
      Returns:
      the UUID.

    • rotation

      int rotation()
      Returns the current rotation state index (0, 1, 2, or 3). 0 = 0°, 1 = 90°, 2 = 180°, 3 = 270°.
      Returns:
      the rotation index.

    • getWeight

      static int getWeight(Rarity rarity)
      Returns the weighted probability for a given rarity to appear in loot generation. Higher weight means higher probability.
      Parameters:
      rarity - the rarity to check.
      Returns:
      the weight value.

    • getRandom

      static Item getRandom(ItemEnum ie, int level)
      Factory method to create a random item based on a category and level. Handles creation logic for different item types (ManaStones, Relics, Armors, Weapons).
      Parameters:
      ie - the category of item to create (e.g., HELMET, SWORD).
      level - the level of the item to generate.
      Returns:
      a new random Item instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if level is negative or item type is unhandled.

    • isCursed

      default boolean isCursed()
      Checks if the item currently has a curse.
      Returns:
      true if cursed, false otherwise (default false).

    • buyingPrice

      static Cost buyingPrice(Item item)
      Calculates the buying price of an item in a shop based on its rarity.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to value.
      Returns:
      the cost to buy the item.

    • sellingPrice

      static Cost sellingPrice(Item item)
      Calculates the selling price of an item (how much the merchant pays you). Usually lower than the buying price.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to sell.
      Returns:
      the value in Gold.

    • becomeCursed

      default Item becomeCursed()
      Applies a curse to the item.
      Returns:
      the item itself (modified) or a new cursed instance.

    • removeCursed

      default Item removeCursed()
      Removes the curse from the item.
      Returns:
      the item itself (modified) or a new uncursed instance.

    • unwrap

      default Item unwrap()
      Unwraps the item if it's decorated or wrapped (e.g., CursedItem wrapper). By default, returns the item itself.
      Returns:
      the base item.
